notes: Phase 2 / Tier 15 (Throne of Thunder) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins MoP Classic Holy Paladin gear guide. Tier set: Lightning Emperor's Headguard/Mantle/Breastplate/Gloves. Tier token bosses per Icy Veins: Twin Consorts (helm), Iron Qon (shoulders), Dark Animus (chest), Council of Elders (hands). Enchants/gems reused from the mop-p3 (Siege of Orgrimmar) list — same items across MoP raid content.
